unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
unit.cpp:define: #define CURL_SB_TERM(x) \ do { \ x->subend = x->subpointer; \ CURL_SB_CLEAR(x); \ } while(0)
unit.function_decl: static CURLcode telrcv(struct Curl_easy *data, const unsigned char *inbuf, /* Data received from socket */ ssize_t count);
static void send_negotiation(struct Curl_easy *data, int cmd, int option);
static void set_local_option(struct Curl_easy *data, int option, int newstate);
static void set_remote_option(struct Curl_easy *data, int option, int newstate);
static void sendsuboption(struct Curl_easy *data, int option);
static CURLcode telnet_done(struct Curl_easy *data, CURLcode, bool premature);
static CURLcode send_telnet_data(struct Curl_easy *data, char *buffer, ssize_t nread);
unit.typedef: typedef enum { CURL_TS_DATA = 0, CURL_TS_IAC, CURL_TS_WILL, CURL_TS_WONT, CURL_TS_DO, CURL_TS_DONT, CURL_TS_CR, CURL_TS_SB, /* sub-option collection */ CURL_TS_SE /* looking for sub-option end */ } TelnetReceive;
unit.decl_stmt: const struct Curl_handler Curl_handler_telnet = { "TELNET", /* scheme */ ZERO_NULL, /* setup_connection */ telnet_do, /* do_it */ telnet_done, /* done */ ZERO_NULL, /* do_more */ ZERO_NULL, /* connect_it */ ZERO_NULL, /* connecting */ ZERO_NULL, /* doing */ ZERO_NULL, /* proto_getsock */ ZERO_NULL, /* doing_getsock */ ZERO_NULL, /* domore_getsock */ ZERO_NULL, /* perform_getsock */ ZERO_NULL, /* disconnect */ ZERO_NULL, /* write_resp */ ZERO_NULL, /* connection_check */ ZERO_NULL, /* attach connection */ PORT_TELNET, /* defport */ CURLPROTO_TELNET, /* protocol */ CURLPROTO_TELNET, /* family */ PROTOPT_NONE | PROTOPT_NOURLQUERY /* flags */ };

function.name: init_telnet
negotiate
printoption
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *direction, int cmd, int option)

function.name: send_negotiation
set_remote_option
rec_will
rec_wont
set_local_option
rec_do
rec_dont
printsub
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int direction, /* '<' or '>' */ unsigned char *pointer, /* where suboption data is */ size_t length)

unit.comment: /* warning C4706: assignment within conditional expression */

function.name: str_is_nonascii
check_telnet_options

unit.comment: /* * suboption() * * Look at the sub-option buffer, and try to be helpful to the other * side. */

function.name: suboption

unit.comment: /* * sendsuboption() * * Send suboption information to the server side. */

function.name: sendsuboption
telrcv
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const unsigned char *inbuf, /* Data received from socket */ ssize_t count)

unit.comment: /* Escape and send a telnet data block */

function.name: send_telnet_data
telnet_done
telnet_do
